title.en: And after the news spread, many forces were cur...

content.en:
Ye Tian couldn't imagine what circumstances or what kind of strong person could destroy an extradimensional territory.

And after the news spread, many forces were curious and even a little worried.

After all, if the strong man destroys the Seven Thousand and One Territory, maybe he will enter the Six Thousand Territory, how will he stop it at that time?

Maybe you can destroy an extradimensional realm with a single blow, and no one can escape.

"Peeping Heaven Pavilion may know the secret!"

Ye Tian immediately went to the Heavenly Pavilion to buy this kind of information.

I thought this kind of information was expensive, but after asking, I found out that it was very cheap.

Obviously, many powerful people have bought information, and maybe it won't be long before specific information will spread, so this kind of information is very cheap.

Ye Tian didn't care about this super dimensional treasure coin, and directly purchased the information.

After the information was in hand, Ye Tiancai finally knew what was going on.

"I didn't expect it to be two powerhouses who had reached the third realm of the transcendent realm in order to snatch a treasure and kill them, which eventually led to the collapse of the Seven Thousand and One Territory. "

Ye Tian was shocked.

Before that, he didn't know what the third realm of the extradimensional realm was, but now he did.

The first realm of the transcendent realm is the transcendent realm that condenses the 20 bodies of the transcendent dimension to break through, and the second realm of the transcendent realm is the existence of comprehending the rules of the transcendent dimension, and the third realm of the transcendent realm is even more terrifying, and the superdimensional Dao fruit in the body derives the existence of the transcendent realm.

This extra-dimensional realm is naturally not a real extra-dimensional realm, but a similar small extra-dimensional realm, and if you want to condense such a super-dimensional realm, you must comprehend the extra-dimensional rules to a very high level, otherwise you will not be able to break through at all.

It can be said that the extra-dimensional realm of the third realm can kill a group of extra-dimensional realms of the second realm in seconds, and a single look can kill the super-dimensional realm of the first realm in seconds.

Even if it is the Six Thousand Territory, it is estimated that there is no such extradimensional realm, and these two extradimensional realms are from the higher-ranked extradimensional realm, and the specific identity is not clear to the Sky Pavilion.

......

Due to the collapse of the 7001 Territory and the extra-dimensional realm of the 3rd Realm, many forces did not dare to step into the shattered 7001 Territory.

However, finally, after one-tenth of the extradimensional era, some forces began to explore the seven thousand and one realms after the shattering and annihilation, where there was nothingness, there was nothing left, and even the power of the third extradimensional realm remained.

Immediately after, a piece of news came out.

In the place of annihilation of the Seven Thousand and One Territory, there are traces of extradimensional rules left by the third realm of extradimensional realms, which are valuable for half-step extradimensional realms and even ordinary extradimensional realms.

However, this trace of extradimensional rules cannot exist forever.

Therefore, many strong people are ready to go over to comprehend the traces of extradimensional rules.

"Traces of extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian was very excited, and was about to comprehend the traces of extradimensional rules.

His extradimensional power has been consummated, and he is qualified for the extradimensional rules, but it is simply too difficult to truly comprehend the extradimensional rules, and there is no hope in sight at present.

But this time, the traces of extradimensional rules gave him hope to comprehend extradimensional rules.

So, he immediately rushed to the territory of seven thousand and one.

At this time, the Garan Chamber of Commerce and other forces have sent many treasure ships to the 7001 Territory Annihilation Land, and any half-step extradimensional realm can buy treasure ship quotas, but the price is too expensive, and it is a price that ordinary half-step extradimensional realms cannot afford.

Ye Tian could rush to the Seven Thousand and One Territory with the help of the Ice Ghost Organization's Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array, but he didn't need to buy the treasure ship quota of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce, otherwise he would still have to wait.

After all, if the number is not enough, the treasure ship of the Garan Chamber of Commerce will not start.

......

Whew!!

Ye Tian used the Boundary Disk and the Domain-Breaking Star Array to cross the boundary superdimensional barrier again and again, and soon arrived at the place of annihilation of the Seven Thousand and One Territory.

The Seven Thousand and One Territory has been destroyed, and there is already nothing here, there is nothing left, only the extremely violent extradimensional void storm, and the power of the third transcendent realm remains, and the peak realm god cannot survive here at all.

Even if it is a half-step extradimensional realm, it is extremely dangerous here, and if you are not careful, you will be bombarded by the power left behind by the third extradimensional realm.

Therefore, it was impossible for Ye Tian to bring the peak realm god of the human race.

Otherwise, the peak realm god will comprehend the power left over from the third realm transcendent realm here, and if he understands it a little, he may be able to comprehend the real transcendent power, so as to advance to a half-step transcendent realm.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian stepped into the place of annihilation of the Seven Thousand and One Territory, feeling the nothingness and brokenness here, there were void fragments everywhere, and there were traces of the power of the third realm in many territories, these traces were extremely terrifying, he felt his unbearable breath, if he touched it, he was afraid that he would be directly killed by the power of the third realm transcendent realm.

Therefore, after Ye Tian entered here, he was very cautious, and he didn't even dare to probe indiscriminately with his will, otherwise he would detect the power of the third realm beyond the dimensional realm, and if he followed his will, he would definitely be killed in seconds.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed a corpse of a half-step transcendent realm, and it seemed that a small attack pierced through the skull, and the vitality was directly obliterated, showing that 137 was killed in an instant by the power of the third transcendent realm.

"It should be the first batch of half-step transcendental realms to come over, but they touched the power of the third transcendent realm, and they were killed in seconds!" Ye Tian secretly sighed.

To prevent this replica body from being killed in seconds, Ye Tian condensed another replica body before continuing to explore.

I have to say that this land of annihilation is full of the power of the third transcendent realm, but many traces of power do not contain the power of extradimensional rules, but only traces of the third transcendent realm caused by the aftermath of the attack.

Ye Tian was very careful, coupled with his own strong strength, the power of the super dimension had also reached the consummation realm, so there was nothing wrong.

this day.

Ye Tian finally sensed a trace of an extra-dimensional rule, this trace was very small, only three hundred meters long, it was an attack trace caused by an extra-dimensional rule.

After Ye Tian approached this trace of extradimensional rules, he immediately sat down cross-legged, and then immediately urged the strange blood pupil to dissect the extradimensional rules.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's extreme operation of the weird blood pupil, coupled with the super-dimensional power of the consummation realm to comprehend and analyze the super-dimensional rules, but the grade of the weird blood pupil is still a little lower, and it is undoubtedly a fool's dream to dissect this trace of the extra-dimensional rules.

However, he can at least comprehend the extradimensional rules faster.
